title: bus.tengine.agent.lifecycle v1
description: When: An agent working on a bead transitions between lifecycle phases (dispatched, reading, editing, building, verifying, done, stuck). Source: /tengine. Emitted by the orchestrator on each phase change so consumers can track agent progress and detect stalls.

host.description: Hostname of the machine that generated this event.

agent_name.description: Name of the agent that transitioned phase, e.g. 'loomie-1' or 'researcher'.

bead_id.description: Bead identifier the agent is currently working on.

role.description: Role the agent is playing in this session, e.g. 'loomie', 'researcher', 'tester'.

phase.description: Current lifecycle phase: 'dispatched' (task assigned), 'reading' (parsing context), 'editing' (writing code), 'building' (compiling/running), 'verifying' (running checks), 'done' (completed successfully), 'stuck' (no progress despite attempts).

wt_path.description: Optional absolute path to the worktree directory the agent is working in.

elapsed_sec.description: Wall-clock seconds elapsed since the agent was dispatched to this bead.

parent_session_id.description: Optional parent session identifier for nested agent runs.
